node.text: James encouraged John to continue using his skills and passions for making a difference.

node.text: James finished a big project after months that involved learning a new language and handling many details, which helped him learn about problem-solving, patience, and perseverance.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "James") on James (Score: 1.00)

node.text: James was glad to hear from John and excited to learn about the impact of the software tool John created for the charitable foundation.
